# Vendored pgenlib

This directory was imported from `external_libs/pgenlib` at regenie commit
`d4c47804b097cd70760bd311866bd9c05c577813` (July 15, 2026). The reader is
derived from PLINK 2's pgenlib sources:

https://github.com/chrchang/plink-ng

BOLT-LMM builds these sources directly so release builds do not require a
separate PLINK 2 or regenie installation. Local BOLT integration should live
outside this directory whenever possible so a future pgenlib refresh remains
mechanical.

See `LICENSE` and the individual source headers for license and attribution
information.
